ab: Maxal kngkwasan mu ka kawas ni da.
Niqan ku kingal qbsuran snaw, Kuras ka hangan na, maxal kingal kngkawas kawas ni ka hiya.
ch: 我有一個哥哥，他叫Kuras，他今年11歲。
en: I have a brother, his name is Kuras, he is 11 years old.

ab: Msupu nami mntna kingal sapah pyasan muyas ka yami.
ch: 我們在同一間學校讀書。
en: We study in the same school.

ab: To nami smkuxul muyas uyas ka yami qbsuran mu snaw.
en: Both my brother and I like to sing.

ab: Smkuxul ku tmapaq qsiya ka yaku, kiya u msangay cida, msupu nami musa tmapaq qsiya ka kana tnsapah nami.
ch: 我喜歡游泳，放假的時候，我們全家會一起去游泳。
en: I like swimming. During the holidays, our whole family go swimming together.

ab: Smkuxul ku psdupung burah ka yaku, kiya ka malu nami msupu muyas uyas mi tmapaq qsiya.
ch: 我喜歡認識新朋友，我們可以一起唱歌和游泳。
en: I love meeting new people, we can sing and swim together.
